name: orchestration boot validation: 17 states, ITERATION_CAP, misspelling detection
description: Verifies _registry.validate() fail-closed semantics. Four checks: (1) base validate() returns ok:true on unmodified codebase, (2) 16-state override fails (count mismatch), (3) iteration_cap_override:4 fails (strict equality check), (4) 17-state array with one misspelled ID fails (both missing-real-ID and unknown-ID errors caught).
